8.reason: [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces and ends with '=', so it will not read the full expression. This causes incomplete parsing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces and ends with '=', so it will not read the full expression. This causes incomplete parsing.]
